creator: beech@FreeBSD.org
text:
The pkg-plist is not correct:

===>  Building package for znc-0.054
Creating package /usr/ports/packages/All/znc-0.054.tbz
Registering depends: perl-5.8.8_1.
Creating bzip'd tar ball in '/usr/ports/packages/All/znc-0.054.tbz'
tar: libexec/znc/autoattach.so: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
tar: libexec/znc/autoop.so: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
tar: libexec/znc/away.so: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
tar: libexec/znc/awaynick.so: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
<SNIP>
tar: libexec/znc/webadmin/skins/ice/img/pagebg.gif: Cannot stat: No 
such file or directory
tar: Error exit delayed from previous errors.
pkg_create: make_dist: tar command failed with code 256
*** Error code 1

Please fix it and send me a unified diff,

Beech
